questions.text: What is the first-line treatment for hypertension in a patient with comorbid type 2 diabetes? Include specific drug classes and dosing.

What are the four elements of negligence in tort law? Explain each element with examples.

questions.text: What requirements must a non-compete clause meet to be enforceable? Include key factors courts examine.

Explain TCP vs UDP protocols in detail. Compare their features and provide specific use cases for each.
What are the methods to prevent SQL injection attacks? Explain each method with code-level details.
questions.ref: parameterized queries, ORM, input validation, WAF
